languages.text: "Выжидайте, пока не определится победитель — а потом добейте его".
"Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."
languages.original_text: "Выжидайте, пока не определится победитель — а потом добейте его".

traits.locale_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."
"Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."
"Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

languages.text: 「どちらかが勝利するのを待て。そして、そのあとで、残りの者を倒せ」
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: 「どちらかが勝利するのを待て。そして、そのあとで、残りの者を倒せ。」

languages.text: «Esperemos a que uno de los bandos se alce con la victoria y rematémoslo entonces».
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: «Esperemos a que uno de los bandos se alce con la victoria y rematémoslo entonces».

languages.text: “等到一方胜出，我们再收拾残局。”
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: “等到一方胜出，我们再收拾残局。”

languages.text: "Wartet, bis eine Seite gewonnen hat ... und dann tötet sie."
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: "Wartet, bis eine Seite gewonnen hat ... und dann tötet sie."

languages.text: "Bir taraf zafer kazanana kadar bekleyip sonra işlerini bitirelim."
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: "Bir taraf zafer kazanana kadar bekleyip sonra işlerini bitirelim."

languages.text: « Attendons qu'un camp remporte la victoire, puis éliminons les survivants. »
languages.original_text: "Wait until one side emerges victorious — and then finish them off."

traits.locale_text: « Attendons qu'un camp remporte la victoire, puis éliminons les survivants. »
